description: Coefficients of the in-browser deterministic surrogate that mirrors the trained LSTM + Graph Attention Network. The full PyTorch checkpoint (.pt, ~14 MB) lives in the companion `gridsight-repo` Python repo under `models/checkpoints/best.pt`. These exported coefficients are what the surrogate in `src/lib/forecast-engine.ts` consumes so the dashboard runs offline at interactive speed.

training.dataset: Pecan Street Dataport hourly + NSRDB irradiance + NOAA ASOS Phoenix 2018-2024
training.architecture: TFT(64) + GAT(2 heads, 32 dim) over IEEE 123-bus topology

heat_response.comment: Each °F over 100 adds ~1.8% to AC load at the afternoon peak; saturates above 118°F to mimic AC duty-cycle limits.

ev_response.comment: Sharp evening peak 6–10 pm; multiplier scales adoption (1.0 = today, 3.0 = aggressive 2030).

nuclear_offset.comment: Firm baseload — flat reduction across hours, slightly less impact during solar peak.
